name: Ann Miller
abstract: Ann Miller (born Johnnie Lucille Collier; April 12, 1923 – January 22, 2004) was an American actress and dancer. She was widely known for her work in the classical Hollywood cinema musicals of the 1940s and 1950s, including her roles in Room Service with the Marx Brothers and Frank Capra's You Can't Take It with You, both released in 193…

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: And we got to sing with Ethel Merman and dance with the other one, the girl that did all the dancing — Ann Miller, yeah.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
